title: citrus × tachibana subf. ponki
intro: Citrus × tachibana subf. ponki, also known as sudachi, is a type of citrus plant native to Japan and considered a dwarf citrus species. It has been used for centuries in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and inflammation. The health benefits of sudachi include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and exhibit antimicrobial and antioxidant properties. Sudachi can be prepared as a tea, juice, or oil, and is often used in herbal remedies and supplements, as well as in traditional Japanese cuisine for its flavor and aroma.
